sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90649" key="prou+faire/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προϋφ-αιρέω</orth>, <sense id="n90649.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">snatch</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">π. τὰς ἐκκλησίας</foreign>, i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have</tr_> them <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">held before</tr_> the proper time, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0026.tlg002.perseus-grc1:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aeschin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.61</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
